simple_types.name: STMPE1600_Expander
simple_types.code:
type STMPE1600_Expander (Port : not null HAL.I2C.Any_I2C_Port;
                         Addr : HAL.I2C.I2C_Address) is limited private;

simple_types.name: STMPE1600_Pin_Direction
simple_types.code: type STMPE1600_Pin_Direction is (Input, Output) with Size => 1;

simple_types.name: STMPE1600_Pin_Polarity
simple_types.code: type STMPE1600_Pin_Polarity is (Low, High) with Size => 1;

array_types.name: STMPE1600_Pins
array_types.code:
type STMPE1600_Pins is array (STMPE1600_Pin_Number) of Boolean
  with Pack, Size => 16;

array_types.name: STMPE1600_Pins_Direction

access_types.name: Any_STMPE1600_Expander
access_types.code: type Any_STMPE1600_Expander is access all STMPE1600_Expander;

subprograms.name: As_GPIO_Point
Check_Id

documentation.description: Returns the current value of the interrupt mask.

Tells if pins have changed since last query. Reading this value
clears the state.
The state is set regardless of the interrupt mask.

subprograms.name: Pin_Direction
subprograms.code:
function Pin_Direction
  (This : STMPE1600_Expander;
   Pin  : STMPE1600_Pin_Number)
   return STMPE1600_Pin_Direction

subprograms.name: Pin_State
Pins_State
subprograms.code:
function Pins_State
  (This : in out STMPE1600_Expander) return STMPE1600_Pins

subprograms.name: Set_Interrupt_Enable

documentation.description:
Enables/Disables the interrupt to the host.
Allows also to set whether the interrupt is active High or Low.

subprograms.name: Set_Interrupt_Mask

documentation.description:
Enables the interrupt from a particular GPIO interrupt source to the
host.

subprograms.name: Set_Pin_Direction
Set_Pin_Polarity_Inversion

documentation.description: Enables or disables the polarity inversion of the given input pin

subprograms.name: Set_Pin_State
Set_Pins_State
